goal: Upgrade phase continuation so prediction is driven by residue memory and mapped into v14 orientation operators, then train by wave exposure.
core_rule: Do not train weights. Train residue-phase continuation.

patches.purpose: Predict next phase using recent phase history plus committed residue bias.
Map phase flow into v14 operator pressure without forcing operator selection.

operator_logic.++: stable alignment / low mismatch / forward continuation

code_shape: def operator_pressure(delta_phi, delta_phi_prev, C, E, V):
if delta_phi low and C stable: pressure['++'] += ...
if delta_phi falling after rise: pressure['-+'] += ...

patches.purpose: Apply operator pressure as signature shaping only, not direct v14 mutation.
patches.rule: Operator pressure can rotate, brighten, or damp 12-wheel sectors; it cannot set v14 operator directly.

add: op_pressure = operator_pressure(delta_phi, last_delta_phi, scope_data['C'], scope_data['E'], scope_data['V'])

phases.name: baseline_learning
phases.goal: low delta_phi, stable ++ pressure, residue commits

phases.name: perturbation_test
phases.input: wave A plus noise or frequency drift
phases.goal: delta_phi rises then recovery/-+ pressure appears

success_conditions.continuation: removed tail is internally predicted better than neutral baseline
success_conditions.perturbation: delta_phi detects drift before visible collapse
success_conditions.contrast: different waves form different residue/operator patterns
success_conditions.pathology_goal: undesired-event trajectory produces rising delta_phi before event onset

final_instruction: Implement residue-driven phase prediction and phase-to-operator pressure as legal input-space shaping. Then train by repeated wave exposure and evaluate continuation accuracy through delta_phi.
